ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "univ_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the university is private (True) or public (False) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university */,
  "accreditation_agency" TEXT /* Accreditation agency */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status */,
  "univ_size" TEXT /* Size of the university */,
  "setting" TEXT /* Setting of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("univ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Number of accepted applicants */,
  "enroll" INTEGER /* Number of enrolled students */,
  "top10perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of new students from the top 10% of their high school class */,
  "top25perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of new students from the top 25% of their high school class */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduate students */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduate students */,
  "gpa_req" REAL /* Minimum GPA required for admission */,
  "test_req" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if standardized tests are required */,
  "letter_req" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if letters of recommendation are required */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date by which admission decisions are made */,
  "admission_type" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., early decision, regular decision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES universities ("univ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Out-of-state tuition cost */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Average cost of books and supplies */,
  "personal" INTEGER /* Average cost of personal expenses */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Total educational expenditures per student */,
  "scholarship" INTEGER /* Average scholarship amount */,
  "avg_debt" INTEGER /* Average student debt */,
  "default_rate" REAL /* Loan default rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finances_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES universities ("univ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academics" (
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "phd" INTEGER /* Percentage of faculty with a Ph.D. */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Percentage of faculty with the highest degree in their field */,
  "s_f_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-faculty ratio */,
  "perc_alumni" INTEGER /* Percentage of alumni who donate to the university */,
  "grad_rate" INTEGER /* Graduation rate (percentage of students who graduate within 6 years) */,
  "faculty_age" INTEGER /* Average age of faculty */,
  "faculty_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of faculty */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Average years of experience among faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academics_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES universities ("univ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., admissions, finances) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES universities ("univ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, town) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
